title: David Roach
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''David Roach''' is an artist who penciled the second and third issues of the ''[[Tales of the Jedi: The Saga of Nomi Sunrider]]'' series of [[Star Wars comic books|comics]].

==Sources==
*[[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi 5|''Tales of the Jedi'' 5]]
